            "description": "OK"
          }

      }
    },
    "/api/createAdmin": {
      "post": {
        "tags": [
          "Admin APIs"
        ],
        "summary": "Create a new admin user",
        "description": "Registers a new admin user with name, email, and password.",
        "requestBody": {
          "required": true,
          "content": {
            "application/json": {
              "schema": {
                "type": "object",
                "required": [
                  "adminname",
                  "username",
                  "adminemail",
                  "password"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "adminname": {
                    "type": "string",
                    "example": "Danish Chaush"
                  },
                  "username": {
                    "type": "string",
                    "example": "danish123"
                  },
                  "adminemail": {
                    "type": "string",
                    "example": "danish@example.com"
                  },
                  "password": {
                    "type": "string",
                    "example": "secret123"
                  }
                }
              }
            }
          }
        },
        "responses": {}
      }
    },
    "/api/adminlogin": {
      "post": {
        "tags": [
          "Admin APIs"
        ],
        "summary": "login in admin user",
        "description": "Login  admin user with username, password.",

          "required": true,
          "content": {
            "application/json": {
              "schema": {
                "type": "object",
                "required": [
                  "username",
                  "password"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "username": {
                    "type": "string",

                    "type": "string",

              }

          "required": true,

                "type": "object",

                    "type": "string",

          "required": true,

      "post": {
        "tags": [

        ],
        "summary": "Add computer and system",
        "description": "only Admin can add system",
        "requestBody": {
          "required": true,
          "content": {
            "application/json": {
              "schema": {
                "type": "object",

                  "computerName",
                  "systemLocation"

      "post": {
        "tags": [

        "summary": "update compuer",

        "parameters": [
          {
            "name": "id",
            "in": "path",
            "required": true,
            "schema": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "description": "Computer ID to update"
          }

        "requestBody": {
          "required": true,
          "content": {
            "application/json": {
              "schema": {
                "type": "object",
                "required": [
                  "computerName",
                  "systemLocation"
                ],
                "properties": {
                  "computerName": {
                    "type": "string",
                    "example": "Acer"
                  },
                  "systemLocation": {
                    "type": "string",
                    "example": "system1"
                  },
                  "status": {
                    "type": "string",
                    "example": "0"
                  }
                }
              }
            }
          }

        "description": "only Admin can get All ID",

          "name": "page",
          "in": "query",
          "description": "Page number (default: 1)",
          "required": false,
          "schema": {
            "type": "integer",
            "example": 1
          }

          "name": "limit",
          "in": "query",

    "/api/adduser":{
      "post":{
        "tags": ["User Management"],
        "summary": "Add a new user",
        "description": "Creates a new user with details like name, phone, computer, ID proof, fees, etc.",
        "requestBody": {
      "required": true,
      "content": {
        "application/json": {
          "schema": {
            "type": "object",
            "required": ["username", "phone", "computer", "idProof"],
            "properties": {
              "username": { "type": "string", "example": "John Doe" },
              "email": { "type": "string", "example": "john@example.com" },
              "phone": { "type": "string", "example": "+911234567890" },
              "address": { "type": "string", "example": "123 Street, City" },
              "computer": { "type": "string", "example": "64e3bcf5f5c123456789abcd" },
              "idProof": { "type": "string", "example": "64e3bcf5f5c987654321abcd" },
              "fees": { "type": "string", "example": "500" },
              "remark": { "type": "string", "example": "First visit" },
              "status": { "type": "string", "example": "0" }
            }
          },
          "examples": {
            "New User": {
              "value": {
                "username": "John Doe",
                "email": "john@example.com",
                "phone": "+911234567890",
                "address": "123 Street, City",
                "computer": "64e3bcf5f5c123456789abcd",
                "idProof": "64e3bcf5f5c987654321abcd",
                "fees": "50",
                "remark": "First visit",
                "status": "1"
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
    },
    "responses":{}
      }

    "/api/updateuser/{id}":{
      "post":{
        "tags": ["User Management"],
        "summary": "Update a single user",
        "description": "Only admin can update user details like outTime and status",
        "parameters": [
          {
            "name": "id",
            "in": "path",
            "required": true,
            "description": "ID of the user to update",
            "schema": {
              "type": "string"
            }
          }
    ],
    "requestBody": {
    "required": true,
      "content": {
          "application/json": {
            "schema": {
              "type": "object",
              "properties": {
                "outTime": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "format": "date-time",
                  "example": "2024-06-22T06:55:00Z"
                },
                "status": {
                  "type": "string",
                  "example": "1"
                }
              },
              "required": ["status"]
            }
          }
      }
    },
    "responses": {}
      }
    }
  }
